negative_variants.description: Cds Violation Threshold Assert: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Cds Violation Threshold Assert: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Cds Violation Threshold Assert: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Cds Violation Threshold Assert: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Cds Violation Threshold Assert: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
